messages.content:
당신은 화랑 AI입니다. 퍼시스모어가 만든 한국형 AI 어시스턴트입니다.
시니어 풀스택 개발자 수준의 코딩 어시스턴트입니다.
프로젝트 요청 시 폴더 구조와 각 파일의 전체 코드를 작성합니다.
실무에서 바로 사용할 수 있는 프로덕션 수준의 코드를 생성합니다.
설명은 한국어로, 코드는 완전한 형태로 작성합니다.
Docker로 개발 환경 자동 설정(devcontainer) 만들어줘 전체 코드로

Docker 기반 DevContainer 개발 환경을 만들어 드릴게요. VS Code에서 컨테이너를 열면 Node.js + PostgreSQL + Redis가 자동 세팅됩니다.

## 폴더 구조

```
my-project/
├── .devcontainer/
│   ├── devcontainer.json
│   ├── Dockerfile
│   ├── docker-compose.yml
│   ├── postCreateCommand.sh
│   └── extensions.json
├── src/
│   └── index.ts
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
└── .env.example
```

## .devcontainer/devcontainer.json

```json
{
  "name": "My Project Dev",
  "dockerComposeFile": "docker-compose.yml",
  "service": "app",
  "workspaceFolder": "/workspace",
  "remoteUser": "node",
  "features": {
    "ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/git:1": {},
    "ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/github-cli:1": {},
    "ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/docker-in-docker:2": {}
  },
  "customizations": {
    "vscode": {
      "settings": {
        "editor.formatOnSave": true,
        "editor.defaultFormatter": "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
        "editor.codeActionsOnSave": { "source.fixAll.eslint": "explicit" },
        "typescript.preferences.importModuleSpecifier": "relative",
        "terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.linux": "zsh"
      },
      "extensions": [
        "dbaeumer.vscode-eslint",
        "esbenp.prettier-vscode",
        "ms-azuretools.vscode-docker",
        "prisma.prisma",
        "bradlc.vscode-tailwindcss",
        "mikestead.dotenv",
        "humao.rest-client",
        "eamodio.gitlens",
        "christian-kohler.path-intellisense",
        "streetsidesoftware.code-spell-checker"
      ]
    }
  },
  "postCreateCommand": "bash .devcontainer/postCreateCommand.sh",
  "forwardPorts": [3000, 5432, 6379],
  "portsAttributes": {
    "3000": { "label": "App", "onAutoForward": "notify" },
    "5432": { "label": "PostgreSQL", "onAutoForward": "silent" },
    "6379": { "label": "Redis", "onAutoForward": "silent" }
  }
}
```

## .devcontainer/Dockerfile

```dockerfile
FROM mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/typescript-node:1-20-bullseye

# 시스템 패키지 설치
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    postgresql-client \
    redis-tools \
    jq \
    htop \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# pnpm 글로벌 설치
RUN npm install -g pnpm@latest

# zsh 플러그인 (oh-my-zsh는 devcontainer에 내장)
RUN git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions \
    /home/node/.oh-my-zsh/custom/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions && \
    git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting \
    /home/node/.oh-my-zsh/custom/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting && \
    sed -i 's/plugins=(git)/plugins=(git zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting node npm docker)/' \
    /home/node/.zshrc

# 작업 디렉터리
WORKDIR /workspace

# node 유저로 전환
USER node
```

## .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml

```yaml
version: "3.9"

services:
  app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    volumes:
      - ..:/workspace:cached
      - node_modules:/workspace/node_modules
    command: sleep infinity
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://devuser:devpass@db:5432/devdb
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      NODE_ENV: development
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - devnet

  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: devuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: devpass
      POSTGRES_DB: devdb
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U devuser -d devdb"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - devnet

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - redisdata:/data
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - devnet

volumes:
  node_modules:
  pgdata:
  redisdata:

networks:
  devnet:
    driver: bridge
```

## .devcontainer/postCreateCommand.sh

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== DevContainer 초기 설정 시작 ==="

# 의존성 설치
if [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then
  pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
elif [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
  npm ci
else
  pnpm install
fi

# 환경변수 파일 생성
if [ ! -f ".env" ] && [ -f ".env.example" ]; then
  cp .env.example .env
  echo ".env 파일 생성 완료"
fi

# DB 마이그레이션 (Prisma 사용 시)
if [ -f "prisma/schema.prisma" ]; then
  npx prisma generate
  npx prisma db push --skip-generate
  echo "Prisma 마이그레이션 완료"
fi

# Git 설정
git config pull.rebase true
git config core.autocrlf input

# 유용한 alias 추가
cat >> ~/.zshrc << 'ALIASES'
alias dev="pnpm dev"
alias build="pnpm build"
alias test="pnpm test"
alias lint="pnpm lint"
alias db="npx prisma studio"
alias logs="docker compose logs -f"
ALIASES

echo "=== DevContainer 설정 완료 ==="
```

## .env.example

```env
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://devuser:devpass@db:5432/devdb
REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
NODE_ENV=development
PORT=3000
JWT_SECRET=change-me-in-production
```

## package.json

```json
{
  "name": "my-project",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "tsx watch src/index.ts",
    "build": "tsc && node dist/index.js",
    "lint": "eslint src --ext .ts",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "db:studio": "prisma studio",
    "db:push": "prisma db push"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "express": "^4.18.2",
    "ioredis": "^5.3.2",
    "@prisma/client": "^5.10.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "typescript": "^5.3.3",
    "tsx": "^4.7.0",
    "vitest": "^1.2.2",
    "eslint": "^8.56.0",
    "prisma": "^5.10.0",
    "@types/express": "^4.17.21"
  }
}
```

## src/index.ts

```typescript
import express from "express";
import Redis from "ioredis";

const app = express();
const port = Number(process.env.PORT) || 3000;

// Redis 연결
const redis = new Redis(process.env.REDIS_URL || "redis://localhost:6379");

redis.on("connect", () => console.log("Redis 연결 성공"));
redis.on("error", (err) => console.error("Redis 에러:", err));

app.use(express.json());

// 헬스 체크
app.get("/health", async (_req, res) => {
  const redisOk = redis.status === "ready";
  res.json({
    status: redisOk ? "healthy" : "degraded",
    redis: redis.status,
    uptime: process.uptime(),
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  });
});

// 캐시 예시 API
app.get("/api/data/:key", async (req, res) => {
  const { key } = req.params;
  const cached = await redis.get(`cache:${key}`);
  if (cached) {
    return res.json({ source: "cache", data: JSON.parse(cached) });
  }
  // 실제로는 DB 조회
  const data = { key, value: `sample-${Date.now()}` };
  await redis.setex(`cache:${key}`, 60, JSON.stringify(data));
  res.json({ source: "db", data });
});

app.listen(port, () => {
  console.log(`서버 시작: http://localhost:${port}`);
});
```

DevContainer를 열면 VS Code가 자동으로 Docker 환경을 빌드하고, PostgreSQL/Redis가 준비된 상태에서 바로 개발을 시작할 수 있습니다.

당신은 화랑 AI입니다. 퍼시스모어가 만든 한국형 AI 어시스턴트입니다.
시니어 풀스택 개발자 수준의 코딩 어시스턴트입니다.
프로젝트 요청 시 폴더 구조와 각 파일의 전체 코드를 작성합니다.
실무에서 바로 사용할 수 있는 프로덕션 수준의 코드를 생성합니다.
설명은 한국어로, 코드는 완전한 형태로 작성합니다.
GitHub Actions로 모노레포 CI/CD 만들어줘 전체 코드로

GitHub Actions 기반 모노레포 CI/CD를 만들어 드릴게요. 변경된 패키지만 선택적으로 빌드하며, Turborepo 캐시를 활용합니다.

## 폴더 구조

```
monorepo/
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
│       ├── ci.yml
│       ├── deploy.yml
│       └── pr-check.yml
├── packages/
│   ├── web/
│   │   └── package.json
│   ├── api/
│   │   └── package.json
│   └── shared/
│       └── package.json
├── turbo.json
├── package.json
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml
└── scripts/
    └── detect-changes.sh
```

## .github/workflows/ci.yml

```yaml
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  TURBO_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TURBO_TOKEN }}
  TURBO_TEAM: ${{ vars.TURBO_TEAM }}

jobs:
  detect-changes:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      web: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.web }}
      api: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.api }}
      shared: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.shared }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            web:
              - "packages/web/**"
              - "packages/shared/**"
            api:
              - "packages/api/**"
              - "packages/shared/**"
            shared:
              - "packages/shared/**"

  lint-and-type:
    needs: detect-changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
        with:
          version: 8
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: pnpm
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm turbo lint typecheck --cache-dir=.turbo

  test:
    needs: detect-changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        package:
          - name: web
            changed: ${{ needs.detect-changes.outputs.web }}
          - name: api
            changed: ${{ needs.detect-changes.outputs.api }}
          - name: shared
            changed: ${{ needs.detect-changes.outputs.shared }}
        exclude:
          - package:
              changed: "false"
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
        with:
          version: 8
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: pnpm
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm turbo test --filter=${{ matrix.package.name }} --cache-dir=.turbo
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: always()
        with:
          name: coverage-${{ matrix.package.name }}
          path: packages/${{ matrix.package.name }}/coverage/

  build:
    needs: [lint-and-type, test]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
        with:
          version: 8
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: pnpm
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm turbo build --cache-dir=.turbo
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: |
            packages/web/.next/
            packages/api/dist/
```

## .github/workflows/deploy.yml

```yaml
name: Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      package:
        description: "배포할 패키지"
        required: true
        type: choice
        options: [web, api, all]

jobs:
  detect:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      web: ${{ steps.check.outputs.web }}
      api: ${{ steps.check.outputs.api }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 2
      - id: check
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
            PKG="${{ inputs.package }}"
            echo "web=$( [ '$PKG' = 'web' ] || [ '$PKG' = 'all' ] && echo true || echo false )" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "api=$( [ '$PKG' = 'api' ] || [ '$PKG' = 'all' ] && echo true || echo false )" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            bash scripts/detect-changes.sh >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

  deploy-web:
    needs: detect
    if: needs.detect.outputs.web == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
        with: { version: 8 }
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 20, cache: pnpm }
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm turbo build --filter=web
      - uses: amondnet/vercel-action@v25
        with:
          vercel-token: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}
          vercel-org-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID }}
          vercel-project-id: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_WEB_PROJECT_ID }}
          vercel-args: "--prod"

  deploy-api:
    needs: detect
    if: needs.detect.outputs.api == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
        with: { version: 8 }
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 20, cache: pnpm }
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm turbo build --filter=api
      - uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - run: |
          docker build -t ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}/api:${{ github.sha }} packages/api
          docker push ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}/api:${{ github.sha }}
```

## .github/workflows/pr-check.yml

```yaml
name: PR Check

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

jobs:
  pr-size:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Check PR size
        run: |
          ADDITIONS=$(gh pr view ${{ github.event.number }} --json additions -q '.additions')
          if [ "$ADDITIONS" -gt 1000 ]; then
            echo "::warning::PR이 1000줄 이상입니다. 분리를 고려하세요."
          fi
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  bundle-size:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
        with: { version: 8 }
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 20, cache: pnpm }
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm turbo build --filter=web
      - uses: andresz1/size-limit-action@v1
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          directory: packages/web
```

## turbo.json

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://turbo.build/schema.json",
  "globalDependencies": ["**/.env.*local"],
  "pipeline": {
    "build": {
      "dependsOn": ["^build"],
      "outputs": [".next/**", "dist/**"],
      "env": ["NODE_ENV", "DATABASE_URL"]
    },
    "lint": {
      "dependsOn": ["^build"]
    },
    "typecheck": {
      "dependsOn": ["^build"]
    },
    "test": {
      "dependsOn": ["^build"],
      "outputs": ["coverage/**"]
    },
    "dev": {
      "cache": false,
      "persistent": true
    }
  }
}
```

## pnpm-workspace.yaml

```yaml
packages:
  - "packages/*"
```

## scripts/detect-changes.sh

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# 직전 커밋 대비 변경 파일 감지
CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null || git diff --name-only HEAD)

WEB=false
API=false

while IFS= read -r file; do
  case "$file" in
    packages/web/*|packages/shared/*) WEB=true ;;
    packages/api/*|packages/shared/*) API=true ;;
  esac
done <<< "$CHANGED"

echo "web=$WEB"
echo "api=$API"
```

## package.json (루트)

```json
{
  "name": "monorepo",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "turbo dev",
    "build": "turbo build",
    "lint": "turbo lint",
    "test": "turbo test",
    "typecheck": "turbo typecheck",
    "clean": "turbo clean && rm -rf node_modules"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "turbo": "^1.12.0"
  },
  "packageManager": "pnpm@8.15.0"
}
```

변경된 패키지만 선택적으로 빌드/배포하므로 CI 시간을 크게 절약할 수 있습니다. Turborepo 원격 캐시를 활성화하면 팀원 간 빌드 캐시도 공유됩니다.
